summary: Completed frontend testing of URL renaming (/admin/ → /management/, /light/ → /production/) and time-to-Salle field changes. Fixed one bug in Picking.js edit form that was still using datetime-local instead of date + Salle fields.
passed_tests: Login page (/) shows 'Gestion' label
Login page shows 'Accéder à Production' link pointing to /production/login
Admin login redirects to /management/interventions
Admin sidebar shows 'Gestion' label
Production login page (/production/login) shows 'Production' label
Production login page shows 'Gestion' back link pointing to /
Production login with PIN 1234 redirects to /production/interventions
All admin sidebar nav links point to /management/* URLs
All /management/* routes work (interventions, cabinets, products, orders, consumption, employees, movements)
All /production/* routes work (interventions, picking-libre, restock)
Admin Interventions table has columns: Date, Salle, MRN, Date naissance, Produits, Statut
Admin create intervention form has 4 fields in one row: Date (date-only), Salle (2 digits max), MRN, Date naissance
Salle field only accepts digits (letters are filtered out)
Salle field max 2 characters enforced
Creating intervention with date + salle works (API call succeeds)
Created intervention shows Salle badge (violet) in table
Production interventions list shows SALLE box (violet) instead of time
Production create modal has Date + Salle + MRN + Date naissance fields
Production edit modal has Date + Salle + MRN + Date naissance fields
Picking page edit form has Date + Salle + MRN + Date naissance fields (after fix)
Navigation from production pages (restock, picking-libre) uses /production/ URLs
seed_data_creation: Created test intervention with MRN: TEST-MRN-123, Salle: 07, Date: 2026-04-15
context_for_next_testing_agent: URL renaming complete: /admin/ → /management/, /light/ → /production/. Labels changed: 'Client Lourd' → 'Gestion', 'Client Léger' → 'Production'. Intervention forms now use date-only (not datetime-local) + Salle field (operating_room, 2-digit numeric). Tables show Salle column instead of time. Light client intervention list shows SALLE badge (violet) instead of clock/time. Fixed Picking.js edit form to use InterventionFormFields component.

bug_fixed.issue: Edit form was still using datetime-local input instead of date + Salle fields
bug_fixed.fix: Replaced inline form with InterventionFormFields component
